raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find files where group has only read permission (r--). Use find with -perm -g=r and not -perm -g=w -perm -g=x. Actually group read only: group permissions = 4. So -perm -g=r and not -perm -g=w and not -perm -g=x. Use -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Then list. Use ls -l. Command: find /workspace -type f -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x -exec ls -l {} +.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need find files where group has only read permission (r--). Use find with -perm -g=r and not -perm -g=w -perm -g=x. Actually group read only: group permissions = 4. So -perm -g=r and not -perm -g=w and not -perm -g=x. Use -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x. Then list. Use ls -l. Command: find /workspace -type f -perm -g=r -a ! -perm -g=w -a ! -perm -g=x -exec ls -l {} +.
